tasks.title: Define the movement-thruster tuning profile
tasks.summary: Define immutable validated locomotion/thruster tuning and its deterministic identity.
tasks.objective: Define immutable validated locomotion/thruster tuning and its deterministic identity.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: All required fields validate; equivalent profiles fingerprint identically and invalid values fail.
verification: Automated field, range, canonical-order and fingerprint tests.
Manual review confirms coefficients remain evidence-controlled.
non_goals: No mature balance values or Unity assets.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic base locomotion
tasks.summary: Implement deterministic responsive acceleration, braking, speed bounds and bounded inertia independent from aim.
tasks.objective: Implement deterministic responsive acceleration, braking, speed bounds and bounded inertia independent from aim.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: Player Intents v1 and MT-001 tuning.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Normalized move intent deterministically produces bounded responsive velocity while aim is ignored.
verification: Automated acceleration, braking, reversal, diagonal and timestep tests.
Manual velocity-trace review.
non_goals: No thruster, collision, camera or animation.

tasks.title: Implement the thruster charge and regeneration bank
tasks.summary: Track thruster charges, fractional regeneration, consumption and activation eligibility.
tasks.objective: Track thruster charges, fractional regeneration, consumption and activation eligibility.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
outputs: Thruster bank state, stepper and tests.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Charges never underflow/overflow and recharge order is deterministic.
verification: Automated consume, regenerate, cap and timestep tests.
Manual charge-timeline review.
edge_cases: Activation on the exact recharge boundary.
non_goals: No burst movement, HUD or persistence.

tasks.title: Implement thruster activation, steering, and exit momentum
tasks.summary: Implement charge-consuming velocity replacement, bounded steering, startup forgiveness, chaining and controlled exit momentum.
tasks.objective: Implement charge-consuming velocity replacement, bounded steering, startup forgiveness, chaining and controlled exit momentum.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: Player Intents v1 plus MT-002 and MT-003.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Activation and every burst phase are deterministic and remain inside MT-001 bounds.
verification: Automated activation, steering, forgiveness, chaining and exit tests.
Manual trajectory review.
non_goals: No invulnerability, collision response, effects or audio.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic wall reflection
tasks.summary: Calculate deterministic bounded wall reflection from contact normals and tuning.
tasks.objective: Calculate deterministic bounded wall reflection from contact normals and tuning.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: MT-001 tuning and MT-004 burst semantics.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Head-on, grazing and repeated contacts yield finite predictable bounded results without Unity types.
verification: Automated vector, invalid-normal, corner and speed-bound tests.
Manual incoming/outgoing vector review.
non_goals: No general rigid-body bounce or camera response.

tasks.title: Implement weighted enemy-contact and grace rules
tasks.summary: Resolve light shove-through, heavy blocking and bounded per-enemy contact grace.
tasks.objective: Resolve light shove-through, heavy blocking and bounded per-enemy contact grace.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: Combat Messages v1 plus MT-001 and MT-004.
outputs: Contact policy, grace tracker and tests.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Weight outcomes and grace are explicit, stable-ID keyed, bounded and deterministic.
verification: Automated light/heavy/unknown, duplicate, expiry and capacity tests.
Manual contact-matrix review.
non_goals: No damage, enemy AI, prefab or mission state.

tasks.title: Create the movement input action map and adapter
tasks.summary: Map keyboard/mouse and gamepad move, aim and thruster actions to identical CS-003 intents.
tasks.objective: Map keyboard/mouse and gamepad move, aim and thruster actions to identical CS-003 intents.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: Pinned Input System, assembly graph, Player Intents v1 and EH-002 fixture.
outputs: Input action asset, adapter and tests.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: No device identifiers enter gameplay; focus loss, disable and disconnect clear held state.
verification: Automated binding, phase, simultaneous-action and device-equivalence tests.
Manual keyboard/gamepad intent-trace review.
edge_cases: Focus loss while thruster is held.
non_goals: No rebinding UI, aim assist, touch or combat input.

tasks.title: Bridge movement state to Rigidbody2D
tasks.summary: Apply domain movement through an explicit fixed-step Rigidbody2D adapter without creating second authority.
tasks.objective: Apply domain movement through an explicit fixed-step Rigidbody2D adapter without creating second authority.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: 2D baseline, assembly graph, MT-002 and MT-004.
outputs: Body adapter, fixed-step driver and tests.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Only 2D physics is used; domain velocity remains authoritative and lifecycle is idempotent.
verification: Automated fixed-step, lifecycle, bounds and no-3D-type tests.
Manual commanded/observed velocity review.
non_goals: No prefab, scene edit, contacts or camera.

tasks.title: Bridge Unity 2D contacts to movement collision policies
tasks.summary: Translate Unity 2D wall/enemy contacts into MT-005/MT-006 inputs and apply validated outcomes once.
tasks.objective: Translate Unity 2D wall/enemy contacts into MT-005/MT-006 inputs and apply validated outcomes once.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
inputs: 2D baseline, Combat Messages v1, MT-005, MT-006 and MT-008.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Classification uses explicit contracts; invalid or duplicate callbacks fail safely without duplicate outcomes.
verification: Automated wall/light/heavy/unknown, corner, duplicate and tunneling-sentinel tests.
Manual benchmark-shell contact review.
non_goals: No enemy behavior, damage, scene ownership or general physics framework.

tasks.title: Assemble the movement actor runtime
tasks.summary: Compose input, domain stepping, body and contacts through explicit construction and disposal.
tasks.objective: Compose input, domain stepping, body and contacts through explicit construction and disposal.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
outputs: Movement actor, lifecycle coordinator and tests.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: No scene search or implicit ordering; fifty restart cycles leave no stale input, callbacks or drivers.
verification: Automated lifecycle, idempotency, duplicate-prevention and 50-cycle leak tests.
Manual repeated benchmark restart review.
non_goals: No Bootstrap edit, prefab, respawn or combat composition.

tasks.title: Expose read-only thruster status
tasks.summary: Project immutable thruster readiness, charges, recharge, burst, steering and tuning identity.
tasks.objective: Project immutable thruster readiness, charges, recharge, burst, steering and tuning identity.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Projection cannot mutate runtime state and reports unavailable/disposed state explicitly.

tasks.title: Add movement-thruster evidence scenarios
tasks.summary: Run frozen movement evidence in the existing benchmark arena without editing that scene.
tasks.objective: Run frozen movement evidence in the existing benchmark arena without editing that scene.
tasks.context: S1.1 frozen question: prove responsive locomotion and signature thruster feel within the accepted eight-day cap.
outputs: Evidence fixture, scenario tests and frozen tuning fixture.
implementation_notes: Exclusive listed-path ownership; no save/registry impact; no serialized scene edits; rollback owned files; debt needs human approval.
acceptance_criteria: Scenarios cover locomotion, burst, chain, steering, forgiveness, exit, reflection, shove, block, focus loss and restart with identity.
verification: Automated deterministic trace, restart, validity, performance and manifest tests.
Manual editor/Windows feel review separate from technical validity.
non_goals: No combat, weapons, enemies, rewards, HUD or Stage 1 pass claim.
